product_results.title: SURRAY Running Shoes Womens Tennis Walking Sneakers Athletic Gym Breathable Lightweight Jogging Sport Shoe US Size 5.5-11

summary.text: Customers find these shoes super comfortable and note they feel very smooth on a walk. They describe the shoes as really nice and great in appearance. However, customers report issues with the sole material, describing it as hard plastic. Opinions on fit vary among customers.

authors_reviews.title: Amazing
authors_reviews.text: Great shoes, so comfy. They fit wide width feet
authors_reviews.author: Amazon customer

authors_reviews.title: Woman's running shoes
authors_reviews.text: These runners have a plastic sole on outside. There isn't much give, and stretching the toe area was impossible it seemed like. Will not buy them again
authors_reviews.author: Leanne Bennett

authors_reviews.title: ❤️
authors_reviews.text: I love these. Super comfy. I wear them daily to and from work.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Slippy grip
authors_reviews.text: I’m giving 3 stars because I found the shoe feel to be very hard and plastic and not hold a good grip indoors.
authors_reviews.author: Lindsay Hopps

authors_reviews.title: Size fits perfectly
authors_reviews.text: Amazing quality and fits perfectly. A bit brighter purple than I had expected. If you love purple then definitely get it. Also very comfortable as well!
authors_reviews.author: Chee
